calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Atiachment
Off Calendar Oct-20-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC.'S Application For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Atiachment is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare and submit a proposed order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
